title: No XP Anvil
description: This mod makes so that the anvil doesn't require XP to be used.
body:
# 🔨 No XP Anvil Ever looked at an anvil and thought
_“Why do I need XP for this?”_ **Yeah**. **Same**. -------------------------------------- No XP Anvil removes all experience costs from anvils, letting you rename, repair, and combine items for free. No levels required, no XP consumed, no limits getting in your way.
